title: coap_keys.c: no mutual exclusion between encode and store operations
description:
File: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_keys.c
Lines: 629-684

The encode_keys_list_cbor function reads from the key store without holding s_mutex:
```c
static size_t encode_keys_list_cbor(uint8_t *buf, size_t buf_size)
{
    size_t count = lichen_key_store_count();  // Acquires/releases mutex
    ...
    size_t n = lichen_key_store_list(entries, ...);  // Acquires/releases mutex
    ...
}
```

Between count() and list(), another thread could add/remove keys, causing:
1. count != n (array header has wrong size)
2. Iterator inconsistency

Should hold mutex for the entire operation or use a snapshot approach.

Category: CONCURRENCY - race condition
